extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz won the Stage 3 ITT, retaining yellow by 6 seconds over BERNAL after THOMAS collapsed to 25th place.
tactical_patterns: THOMAS Geraint rode in service of BERNAL despite being third overall, revealing Sky's hierarchy before mountain stages.
PORTE Richie set fastest split at halfway but faded to third, suggesting ITT pacing issues after injury comeback.
ROGLIC held 6-second gap despite BERNAL's strong ride, indicating defensive ITT strategy when holding small GC lead.

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: relegated to domestique role despite being 3rd GC, finishing 25th shows Sky prioritized BERNAL over him
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: neutral: fastest halfway split but faded significantly, suggesting endurance limitations despite stage win form
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: moved to 2nd at 6 seconds with Thomas working for him, Sky's protected rider pre-mountains
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: defended yellow by exact margin needed, showing mature GC race management in short ITT
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: negative: only 6th place despite time trial specialty, weak signal for GC contention
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: strong ride after poor season start, indicating mid-stage race form coming
